elements.Text: Your friend probably cancelled your plans together because ...

elements.name: cancelled_plans--social_situations--comp_question
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
buttons: They are mad at you because of your previous disagreement.
They remembered they had an important meeting for class at the same time.
elements.correct_value: They remembered they had an important meeting for class at the same time.
